action.reasoning: Observation: Stuck for 13+ iters on ModuleNotFoundError for xgboost (never installed as packages_to_install was omitted from all prior JSONs despite fully ready code in model.py/train.py/predict.py for XGBRegressor with reg:absoluteerror/hist/early_stopping=50 on Morgan FP r=3 2048bit; best MAE still 0.2188 from RF iter6, MLP 0.231). Iter7 curve shows smooth convergence to ~0.22 plateau but FP+ensemble limited. Analysis: xgboost install (allowed, persists) will unblock; with MAE objective + early_stop on val it should beat RF (~0.15-0.18 MAE expected) on this sparse high-dim tabular task for QM9 gaps. Decision: Install xgboost, update model.py (add verbosity=0) + train.py (import xgboost as xgb, use xgb.callback.EarlyStopping(rounds=50, save_best=True), fix iter_num default), run training on full data, submit_eval on best.pkl for test MAE + timing before Mordred/3D GNN opts.
